description: You are an audio producer at KPUB-FM public radio. Create a 15-second station identification bumper in Ardour by editing the narration recording on the 'Audio 1' track. Follow the specifications in the production brief at /home/ga/Audio/bumper_brief.txt. Rename the track to 'Bumper', remove the audio segment between 5.0 and 20.0 seconds, and close the gap. Apply fades of at least 0.1s to the start and end of the bumper. Place markers named 'Edit Point' at 5.0 seconds and 'Bumper End' at the end of the final region. Export the bumper as a WAV file to /home/ga/Audio/bumper_export/kpub_bumper.wav and save the session.
